new_value: {"notes":"Clarified T-Deck keyboard I2C@0x55 (not gpio-keys; dedicated driver on I2C0 SDA18/SCL8/INT46), trackball GPIOs via BOARD_TBOX_*, added pinctrl and comments to t_deck_esp32s3_procpu.dts and t_deck-pinctrl.dtsi. Updated matrix and spec notes for ThinkNode M7 PoE (power delivery via PoE PD chip, WiFi backhaul preferred; ETH PHY uncertain -- filed human bead if needed). Ran 3 codereview passes per chunk (beads 53zg,6d6s,wou1 created+fixed; 3 subsequent clean passes with only P4/opinion). All findings fixed. 3 clean passes achieved. Do not close until verified."}
